items.teach_script: 'I want' is 'je veux'. Je veux.
'To eat' is 'manger'. Manger.
'To drink' is 'boire'. Boire.
'Now' is 'maintenant'. Maintenant. Time words like this usually go at the end.

teach_segments.text: Time words like this usually go at the end.

prompts.cue_en: How would you say: I want?
How would you say: I want to eat?
And: I want to drink?
Just the word: to eat.
Just the word: to drink.
Just: now.
I want to eat now.
prompts.decompose_script: Je veux — manger — maintenant at the end.

prompts.cue_en: I want to drink now.
prompts.decompose_script: Je veux — boire — maintenant.

prompts.cue_en: Again — I want to eat.
Build it: I want to drink now.
prompts.decompose_script: Piece by piece: je veux — boire — maintenant.

prompts.cue_en: And: I want to eat now.
prompts.decompose_script: Je veux — manger — maintenant.

prompts.cue_en: Last one for today: I want to drink.
prompts.decompose_script: Je veux — boire.

items.teach_script: 'You want' is 'tu veux'. Tu veux.
French negation is a sandwich: ne before the verb, pas after it. Je ne veux pas — I don't want.
Spoken French questions are free: say the sentence and let your voice rise. Tu veux manger ? — do you want to eat? Nothing else changes.

teach_segments.text: Spoken French questions are free: say the sentence and let your voice rise.
? — do you want to eat? Nothing else changes.

items.teach_script: In everyday speech the 'ne' often disappears: je veux pas. You'll hear it constantly. Both are right — the full form is the polished one.

teach_segments.text: You'll hear it constantly. Both are right — the full form is the polished one.

prompts.cue_en: A statement: you want to eat.
Now make it a question — do you want to eat?
How would you say: I don't want?
prompts.decompose_script: The verb gets sandwiched: je — ne veux pas.

prompts.cue_en: I don't want to eat.
prompts.decompose_script: The sandwich first, then the verb: je ne veux pas — manger.

prompts.cue_en: I don't want to drink now.
expected: je ne veux pas boire maintenant
prompts.decompose_script: Je ne veux pas — boire — maintenant.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: do you want to drink?
Tell me: you don't want to eat.
prompts.decompose_script: Tu ne veux pas — manger.

prompts.cue_en: Two words to a friend, rising voice: you want?
Ask me: don't you want to drink?
prompts.decompose_script: The statement with rising voice: tu ne veux pas boire ?

prompts.cue_en: Just: you want.
Street French drops the 'ne' — say 'I don't want' the everyday way.
prompts.decompose_script: Just je — veux — pas. The ne stays home.

prompts.cue_en: You don't want to drink now.
expected: tu ne veux pas boire maintenant
prompts.decompose_script: Tu ne veux pas — boire — maintenant.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: do you want to eat now?
prompts.decompose_script: Tu veux manger maintenant — and let it rise.

prompts.cue_en: And: I don't want to eat now.
expected: je ne veux pas manger maintenant
prompts.decompose_script: Je ne veux pas — manger — maintenant.

items.teach_script: 'To go' is 'aller'. Aller.
'To the' squeezes into one little word: 'au'. Au. So 'to the market' is — au marché.

teach_segments.text: 'To the' squeezes into one little word:

items.teach_script: 'The market' is 'le marché'. Marché.
'Later' is 'plus tard'. Plus tard. Another time word — it goes at the end, like maintenant.

teach_segments.text: Another time word — it goes at the end, like

prompts.cue_en: How would you say: I want to go?
To the market — I want to go to the market.
prompts.decompose_script: À plus le squeezes into au: aller au marché.

prompts.cue_en: Just: the market.
Just: later.
I want to go now.
prompts.decompose_script: Je veux aller — maintenant at the end.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: do you want to go to the market?
prompts.decompose_script: Tu veux — aller au marché — rising at the end.

prompts.cue_en: I don't want to go now.
expected: je ne veux pas aller maintenant
prompts.decompose_script: Je ne veux pas — aller — maintenant.

prompts.cue_en: I want to drink later.
prompts.decompose_script: Je veux boire — plus tard at the end.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: do you want to eat later?
prompts.decompose_script: Tu veux manger plus tard — and let it rise.

prompts.cue_en: I don't want to go to the market.
expected: je ne veux pas aller au marché
je veux pas aller au marché
prompts.decompose_script: Je ne veux pas, then the journey: aller au marché.

prompts.cue_en: Again: I want to go.
Now the whole thing: I want to go to the market now.
expected: je veux aller au marché maintenant
prompts.decompose_script: Three pieces: je veux — aller au marché — maintenant.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: do you want to go to the market later?
expected: tu veux aller au marché plus tard
prompts.decompose_script: Tu veux — aller au marché — plus tard — rising at the end.

prompts.cue_en: And: I don't want to go to the market now.
expected: je ne veux pas aller au marché maintenant
je veux pas aller au marché maintenant
prompts.decompose_script: Je ne veux pas — aller au marché — maintenant.

items.teach_script: 'I can' is 'je peux'. Je peux. It works exactly like je veux: je peux manger — I can eat.
'I have to' — I must — is 'je dois'. Je dois.
'You can' is 'tu peux'. Tu peux.
'To go home' has its own verb: 'rentrer'. Rentrer. Je veux rentrer — I want to go home.

teach_segments.text: 'To go home' has its own verb:

prompts.cue_en: How would you say: I can?
I can go now.
prompts.decompose_script: Je peux works like je veux: je peux — aller — maintenant.

prompts.cue_en: I have to eat.
Just: to go home.
I want to go home.
I have to go home now.
prompts.decompose_script: Je dois — rentrer — maintenant.

prompts.cue_en: Just: you can.
I can eat later.
prompts.decompose_script: Je peux manger — plus tard at the end.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: can you go to the market later?
expected: tu peux aller au marché plus tard
prompts.decompose_script: Tu peux — aller au marché — plus tard — rising at the end.

prompts.cue_en: I can't go now.
expected: je ne peux pas aller maintenant
prompts.decompose_script: Same sandwich: je ne peux pas — aller maintenant.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: can you eat now?
prompts.decompose_script: Tu peux manger maintenant — let it rise.

prompts.cue_en: The big one: I can't go to the market now.
expected: je ne peux pas aller au marché maintenant
je peux pas aller au marché maintenant
prompts.decompose_script: Je ne peux pas, then the journey: aller au marché — maintenant.

prompts.cue_en: I have to go to the market later.
expected: je dois aller au marché plus tard
prompts.decompose_script: Je dois — aller au marché — plus tard.

prompts.cue_en: And: I don't want to go home now.
expected: je ne veux pas rentrer maintenant
prompts.decompose_script: Je ne veux pas — rentrer — maintenant.

items.teach_script: 'It is' — 'this is' — is one sound: 'c'est'. C'est. C'est bon — it's good.
'That' — and casually 'this' too — is 'ça'. Ça. Je veux ça — I want that.
'Good' is 'bon'. Bon.
'But' is 'mais'. Mais. It glues two little sentences together.

teach_segments.text: It glues two little sentences together.

prompts.cue_en: How would you say: it's good?
prompts.decompose_script: One sound, then the word: c'est — bon.

prompts.cue_en: I want that.
It's not good.
prompts.decompose_script: Polished: ce n'est pas bon. On the street you'll hear: c'est pas bon.

prompts.cue_en: Just: that.
Ask me: do you want that?
I don't want that.
prompts.decompose_script: Je ne veux pas — ça.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: is it good?
Just: but.
It's good, but I want to go home.
expected: c'est bon mais je veux rentrer
prompts.decompose_script: Two sentences glued with mais: c'est bon — mais — je veux rentrer.

prompts.cue_en: I want that now.
prompts.decompose_script: Je veux ça — maintenant at the end.

prompts.cue_en: It's good, but I don't want that.
expected: c'est bon mais je ne veux pas ça
c'est bon mais je veux pas ça
prompts.decompose_script: C'est bon — mais — je ne veux pas ça.

prompts.cue_en: It's good, but I have to go home now.
expected: c'est bon mais je dois rentrer maintenant
prompts.decompose_script: C'est bon — mais — je dois rentrer maintenant.

prompts.cue_en: I want to go, but I can't go now.
expected: je veux aller mais je ne peux pas aller maintenant
je veux aller mais je peux pas aller maintenant
prompts.decompose_script: Je veux aller — mais — je ne peux pas aller maintenant.

prompts.cue_en: And: it's good, but I don't want that now.
expected: c'est bon mais je ne veux pas ça maintenant
c'est bon mais je veux pas ça maintenant
prompts.decompose_script: C'est bon — mais — je ne veux pas ça maintenant.

items.teach_script: 'To buy' is 'acheter'. Acheter.
Here is your whole future: 'je vais' — I'm going to. Je vais. Je vais manger — I'm going to eat. Any verb you know can follow it.

teach_segments.text: — I'm going to eat. Any verb you know can follow it.

items.teach_script: 'You're going to' is 'tu vas'. Tu vas.

prompts.cue_en: To buy.
I want to buy that.
prompts.decompose_script: Je veux acheter — ça.

prompts.cue_en: The future scaffold — say: I'm going to.
I'm going to buy that.
prompts.decompose_script: Je vais — plus any verb: je vais acheter — ça.

prompts.cue_en: I'm going to eat now.
prompts.decompose_script: Je vais manger — maintenant.

prompts.cue_en: I'm going to go to the market.
prompts.decompose_script: Je vais aller — au marché. Yes, 'going to go' is normal French.

prompts.cue_en: You're going to — say it.
Ask me: are you going to buy that?
prompts.decompose_script: Tu vas acheter ça — let it rise.

prompts.cue_en: I'm not going to buy that.
expected: je ne vais pas acheter ça
prompts.decompose_script: Sandwich the vais: je ne vais pas — acheter ça.

prompts.cue_en: I have to buy that.
prompts.decompose_script: Je dois acheter — ça.

prompts.cue_en: I'm going to go home.
prompts.decompose_script: Je vais — rentrer.

prompts.cue_en: I'm going to go to the market now.
expected: je vais aller au marché maintenant
prompts.decompose_script: Je vais aller — au marché — maintenant.

prompts.cue_en: It's good, but I'm not going to buy that.
expected: c'est bon mais je ne vais pas acheter ça
c'est bon mais je vais pas acheter ça
prompts.decompose_script: C'est bon — mais — je ne vais pas acheter ça.

prompts.cue_en: I'm going to go home, but I have to eat now.
expected: je vais rentrer mais je dois manger maintenant
prompts.decompose_script: Je vais rentrer — mais — je dois manger maintenant.

items.teach_script: 'Tomorrow' is 'demain'. Demain. A time word — so it goes at the end.

teach_segments.text: A time word — so it goes at the end.

items.teach_script: 'Because' is 'parce que'. Parce que. Like mais, it glues two sentences — and now you can give reasons.

teach_segments.text: it glues two sentences — and now you can give reasons.

items.teach_script: 'Today' is 'aujourd'hui'. Aujourd'hui.

prompts.cue_en: Just: tomorrow.
And: today.
I'm going to go tomorrow.
prompts.decompose_script: Je vais aller — demain at the end.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: are you going to go to the market tomorrow?
expected: tu vas aller au marché demain
prompts.decompose_script: Tu vas — aller au marché — demain — and let it rise.

prompts.cue_en: I'm going to buy that tomorrow.
prompts.decompose_script: Je vais acheter ça — demain at the end.

prompts.cue_en: Just: because.
I want to go home because I have to eat.
expected: je veux rentrer parce que je dois manger
prompts.decompose_script: First clause — parce que — second clause: je veux rentrer — parce que — je dois manger.

prompts.cue_en: I can't go now because I have to eat.
expected: je ne peux pas aller maintenant parce que je dois manger
je peux pas aller maintenant parce que je dois manger
prompts.decompose_script: Je ne peux pas aller maintenant — parce que — je dois manger.

prompts.cue_en: I'm going to eat today.
prompts.decompose_script: Je vais manger — aujourd'hui at the end.

prompts.cue_en: I'm not going to go tomorrow.
expected: je ne vais pas aller demain
prompts.decompose_script: Je ne vais pas — aller — demain.

prompts.cue_en: I'm going to eat later because I want to go now.
expected: je vais manger plus tard parce que je veux aller maintenant
prompts.decompose_script: Je vais manger plus tard — parce que — je veux aller maintenant.

prompts.cue_en: The big one: I can't go to the market today because I have to eat.
expected: je ne peux pas aller au marché aujourd'hui parce que je dois manger
je peux pas aller au marché aujourd'hui parce que je dois manger
prompts.decompose_script: Three pieces: je ne peux pas aller au marché aujourd'hui — parce que — je dois manger.

prompts.cue_en: I'm going to go to the market tomorrow because I have to buy that.
expected: je vais aller au marché demain parce que je dois acheter ça
prompts.decompose_script: Je vais aller au marché demain — parce que — je dois acheter ça.

prompts.cue_en: Last one this week: it's good, but I'm going to buy that tomorrow.
expected: c'est bon mais je vais acheter ça demain
prompts.decompose_script: C'est bon — mais — je vais acheter ça demain.

victory_intro.text: Last stretch — you build these yourself.

session_close.text: That's the session. You're done for today — or keep going.
